# PACT -- Programmable Agent Contract Toolkit

> A typed, permission-enforced language for orchestrating AI agents.

PACT is a programming language (not a library or framework) for building AI agent systems with compile-time safety guarantees. It is written in Rust and provides a compiler, runtime, LSP, and CLI toolchain.

## Key Concepts

- **Agents** (`@name`): Entities that execute tools with declared permissions
- **Tools** (`#name`): Functions that agents can call, with required permissions and typed parameters
- **Permissions** (`^name`): Capabilities that agents must have to use tools, enforced at compile time
- **Templates** (`%name`): Reusable output format specifications for structured LLM responses
- **Directives** (`%name`): Composable, parameterized prompt blocks
- **Flows**: Multi-step agent orchestration with dispatch (`->`), pipelines (`|>`), and fallbacks (`?>`)
- **Source Providers**: Built-in, declarative data access (e.g., `^search.duckduckgo`, `^fs.read`)
- **Guardrails**: Automatic compliance boundaries (GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, COPPA) injected from permission declarations

## Sigils

| Sigil | Meaning | Example |
|-------|---------|---------|
| `@` | Agent | `@researcher` |
| `#` | Tool | `#web_search` |
| `$` | Skill | `$summarize` |
| `~` | Memory | `~conversation` |
| `^` | Permission | `^net.read` |
| `%` | Template / Directive | `%report_format` |

## Install

```bash
cargo install pact-lang
```

## Example

```pact
permit_tree {
    ^net  { ^net.read }
    ^llm  { ^llm.query }
}

tool #search {
    requires: [^net.read]
    source: ^search.duckduckgo(query)
    params { query :: String }
    returns :: List<String>
}

agent @researcher {
    permits: [^net.read, ^llm.query]
    tools: [#search]
    model: "claude-sonnet-4-20250514"
}

flow research(topic :: String) -> String {
    results = @researcher -> #search(topic)
    return results
}
```

## CLI Commands

- `pact init` -- scaffold a new .pact file
- `pact check` -- type-check and validate permissions
- `pact run` -- execute a flow (supports Claude, OpenAI, Ollama backends)
- `pact build` -- compile to TOML, Markdown, Claude JSON
- `pact fmt` -- format source code
- `pact doc` -- generate documentation
- `pact test` -- run test declarations
- `pact playground` -- interactive REPL

## Links

- Website: https://pactlang.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/Pact-Lang/pact
- Crates.io: https://crates.io/crates/pact-lang
- License: MIT
